rationale: Demoted HIGH → LOW. The error-taxonomy refinement was useful for understanding failure modes pre-Phase-2, but the taxonomy is already established in t0022 and t0027 produced first-order recovery distributions (B=75/14/11/1/29 clean/reprompt/json_fallback/all_failed/unknown; C=70/18/7/2/33). Further taxonomy refinement is not on the critical path to closing any RQ within the remaining budget.
